name: Oatmeal Cranberry Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup dried cranberries (or other dried fruit)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cream together the butter and sugars until fluffy.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla extract, mixing well.
4. Combine the dry ingredients in a separate bowl.
5. Gradually add the dry mixture to the butter mixture, stirring until well blended.
6. Stir in the dried cranberries.
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a parchment-covered baking sheet.
8. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
9. Allow to cool.
